---
name: Research Task
about: Investigation or evaluation before building
labels: research
---

## Research Question
<!-- What are we trying to find out? -->


## Context
<!-- Why does this matter now? -->


## Scope
<!-- What's in bounds? What's out? -->


## Expected Output
<!-- Report? Decision? Recommendation? Prototype? -->


## Sources to Check
<!-- Where should we look? -->


## Deadline
<!-- When is this needed by? -->
